chunks.title: Judgment on Tyre and Philistia
chunks.reason: A specific oracle addressing the nations of Tyre, Sidon, and Philistia regarding their treatment of Judah.

chunks.title: Call to War in the Valley of Decision
chunks.reason: A series of commands urging nations to gather for judgment and describing the scene of divine war.

chunks.title: Cosmic Signs and Restoration of Zion
chunks.reason: Describes cosmic disturbances followed by the establishment of God's holiness and the future blessing of Judah.
